full_text:
Xiahou Yuan (Miaocai) 夏侯淵 (妙才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Yuan (夏侯淵), styledMiaocai (妙才). Famed for his attacks against the western barbarians. Fell against Liu Bei. Xiahou Yuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
